repos.author: Fincept-Corporation
repos.name: FinceptTerminal
repos.description: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.
repos.summary: 一个现代化金融终端，提供高级市场分析、投资研究和经济数据工具，支持交互式数据探索，适合量化分析师和投资研究人员使用。

repos.author: ruvnet
repos.name: RuView
repos.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repos.summary: 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时人体姿态估计、生命体征监测和存在检测的隐私保护型 AI 工具，全程无需任何视频画面，适合智能家居和医疗监护场景。

repos.author: thunderbird
repos.name: thunderbolt
repos.description: AI You Control: Choose your models. Own your data. Eliminate vendor lock-in.
repos.summary: Thunderbird 邮件客户端的 AI 扩展项目，允许用户自由选择大语言模型、掌控自己的数据，摆脱供应商绑定，强化隐私和自主权。

repos.author: paperless-ngx
repos.name: paperless-ngx
repos.description: A community-supported supercharged document management system: scan, index and archive all your documents
repos.summary: 开源文档管理系统，支持扫描、索引和归档各类纸质/电子文档，配有全文搜索和标签分类，是家庭与小型办公室实现无纸化的热门选择。

repos.author: tractorjuice
repos.name: arc-kit
repos.description: Enterprise Architecture Governance & Vendor Procurement Toolkit
repos.summary: 企业架构治理与供应商采购工具包，帮助企业评估技术选型、管理供应商合同和合规性，适合 CTO 办公室和企业架构团队。

repos.author: koala73
repos.name: worldmonitor
repos.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
repos.summary: AI 驱动的全球情报仪表盘，聚合实时新闻、地缘政治动态和关键基础设施状态，适合记者、外交人员和风险分析师追踪全球局势。

repos.author: openai
repos.name: openai-agents-python
repos.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
repos.summary: OpenAI 官方的多智能体工作流 Python 框架，提供轻量级但功能强大的多 Agent 编排能力，适合构建复杂 AI 自动化流程和 Agent 应用。

repos.author: deepseek-ai
repos.name: DeepGEMM
repos.description: DeepGEMM: clean and efficient FP8 GEMM kernels with fine-grained scaling
repos.summary: DeepSeek 开源的 FP8 矩阵乘法（GEMM）高效 CUDA 内核实现，支持细粒度缩放，专为高性能深度学习计算优化，可显著加速大模型训练推理。

repos.author: pi-hole
repos.name: pi-hole
repos.description: A black hole for Internet advertisements
repos.summary: 网络级广告与追踪器拦截工具，部署在本地 DNS 服务器上即可屏蔽全网广告和恶意追踪域名，轻量、稳定，是自托管隐私保护的经典项目。

repos.author: XTLS
repos.name: Xray-core
repos.description: Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.
repos.summary: Xray 是 v2ray-core 的高性能分支，支持更多协议和功能，广泛用于网络代理与隐私通信，是对抗网络封锁的热门开源解决方案。
